description.title: Automated end to end workflow for internal Amazon auditing team
body: Setup AWS data pipelines to run SQL queries across multiple databases to automate ETL data flow
Developed full stack web server + web app deployed on AWS EC2 to serve audit data
Supports ~150 auditors reviewing over 80k cases per month across multiple regions/countries

description.title: Developing & researching Deep Learning methods for inverse design of porous materials
body: Optimized preexisting sorption modeling simulation code in TensorFlow (~80-100x speedup)
Created DL method for inverse design of non-differentiable functions

description.title: Streamline other nonprofit organizations’ work by implementing technological solutions for their problems
body: Designed and developed an iOS app for The Giving Spirit that allows their volunteers to better coordinate donations and kit distributions (~5k users, twice a year)
Worked with Swift/SwiftUI and iOS design, MVC, Storyboards, auto layout, MapKit, CoreLocation, Firebase
Collaborated with designers and other coders; delegated work
